seoTitle: Cannons Creek vs Cannum — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cannons Creek and Cannum. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cannons Creek vs Cannum: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cannons Creek and Cannum.
heading: Cannons Creek vs Cannum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cannons Creek, Victoria and Cannum, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cannum has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Cannons Creek (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cannons Creek or Cannum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cannons Creek has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Cannum scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cannons Creek scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Cannum scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cannons Creek or Cannum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cannum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
